title: "Replication value of < 0 or X/Z not legal"
body:
Went to rebuild one of my existing designs with the latest dev repo and then ran into the following:

```
%Error: <snip>.sv:213:40: Replication value of < 0 or X/Z not legal (IEEE 1800-2023 11.4.12.1): '4'h8'
                                                   : ... note: In instance '<snip>'

```

`{{4'd8}{|srcA[63:56]}}`

{4'd8} should be considered unsigned should it not?

Perhaps related to the commits around https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/6048?

What I used to build with (plus a ton of directories n stuff on the end)....
```
verilator \
   --cc \
   --top aerial_wrap \
   -sv \
   -DVERILATOR=1 \
   -DCOMMON_CELLS_ASSERTS_OFF=1 \
   --build-jobs 8 \
   --trace \
   --trace-structs \
   --trace-max-array 16 \
   -output-split 15000 \
   --threads 4 \
   -O3 \
```

Verilator 5.039 devel rev v5.038-71-g94bebb2bc

Darwin easyemachine.local 24.5.0 Darwin Kernel Version 24.5.0: Tue Apr 22 19:53:27 PDT 2025; root:xnu-11417.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6041 arm64

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
If pretty trivial, not familiar with the codebase.
code_blocks:
%Error: <snip>.sv:213:40: Replication value of < 0 or X/Z not legal (IEEE 1800-2023 11.4.12.1): '4'h8'
                                                   : ... note: In instance '<snip>'

verilator \
   --cc \
   --top aerial_wrap \
   -sv \
   -DVERILATOR=1 \
   -DCOMMON_CELLS_ASSERTS_OFF=1 \
   --build-jobs 8 \
   --trace \
   --trace-structs \
   --trace-max-array 16 \
   -output-split 15000 \
   --threads 4 \
   -O3 \
